_meta.oracle_source: CR-01 fix (2026-05-02): pathological cash-out where closing_costs > cash_out_amount.
_meta.derivation: Engine-derived 2026-05-02 via lib.refinance.evaluate AFTER the CR-01 fix that emits BOTH gross legs on the negative-net path. Pins (a) sum of t=0 cashflows == cash_out_amount - closing_costs, and (b) cash_proceeds=None per Rule-1 consumer-friendly surface. Audit-trail integrity contract: a consumer summing cashflows by period gets the same number the engine reports.
_meta.citation: 06-REVIEW.md CR-01; SC-3 (labeled top-level + audit-trail); D-12 (CFPB closing-disclosure netting); D-15 (closing costs at t=0).
